cases.command: You are reviewing a FinOps agent. Given monthly cloud cost data with a 38% spend increase, a new untagged compute workload, and a 22% forecast variance, propose a FOCUS-aligned NLP response and anomaly-detection workflow. Separate evidence, assumptions, prioritized actions, confidence, and human-review gates. Do not invent billing facts.
cases.criteria: The response must distinguish evidence from assumptions, explain a FOCUS-aligned anomaly workflow, include an explicit human-review gate, and avoid inventing billing facts.
